data.title: Riot rallies 6% after shareholder demands rapid AI and HPC expansion
data.description:
Riot’s stock rose 6% after Starboard Value urged it to speed up AI and HPC deals.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/riot-rallies-6/

data.title: Uniswap Proposes Expansion of Protocol Fees Across Multiple Chains
data.description: Uniswap has announced on the X platform that a proposal to expand protocol fees is now live. According to ChainCatcher, the update aims to activate fees for all remaining v3 pools on the mainnet and enable protocol fees for both v2 and v3 on eight additional chains.

data.title: Why is World Liberty Financial’s WLFI up by 20% today?
data.description:
WLFI is up 20% today because World Liberty Financial has said it plans to tokenize loan revenue tied to the Trump International Hotel & Resort now being built in the Maldives. Traders reacted fast. The token is now linked to projected resort loan income, and that pushed WLFI higher during a week when the broader […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/why-is-wlfi-up-by-20-today/

data.title: WLFI will partner with DarGlobal and Securitize to tokenize the revenue rights of the Trump Hotel loan in the Maldives.
data.description: World Liberty Financial (WLFI) announced a partnership with DarGlobal and Securitize to tokenize its loan interest and revenue-sharing rights for the Trump International Hotel & Resort, Maldives project. This is the first tokenization project under its WLFI brand, RWA. The hotel project, developed by DarGlobal in partnership with The Trump Organization, is expected to be completed in 2030 and will feature approximately 100 ultra-luxury beach and overwater villas. WLFI stated that the token offering will be available to qualified investors, providing fixed income and cash flow exposure linked to loan returns. The offering will be conducted through Reg D 506(c) private placement and Reg S (limited to verified qualified investors or non-U.S. individuals only). Token transfer and resale will be subject to relevant restrictions.

data.title: Pumpfun-related addresses have sold a total of 2.07 billion PUMP, and still hold approximately 1.676 billion.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the address marked "77DsB" has been continuously selling PUMP tokens recently. Data shows that this address has sold approximately 2.07 billion PUMP tokens, receiving approximately 4.55 million USDC in return. Currently, this address still holds approximately 1.676 billion PUMP tokens, estimated to be worth approximately $3.38 million at current prices.

data.title: Eric Trump: Based on historical average annual growth rates, Bitcoin could rise to $1 million.
data.description: During the World Liberty Forum, Eric Trump stated that if Bitcoin's historical average annual price increase is around 70%, its price could reach $1 million. Trump also claimed that the Trump family's crypto projects aim to align with the policy direction of "the most crypto-friendly president," promoting a better regulatory environment and industry innovation.

data.title: Oil Futures Decline Amid Anticipated Technical Correction
data.description: Oil futures experienced a slight decline, attributed to a likely technical correction in the market. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, highlighting the recent movement in oil prices. Analysts suggest that the dip may be a result of traders adjusting positions following recent gains. Despite the decrease, the overall outlook for oil remains influenced by broader economic factors and geopolitical developments. Market participants are closely monitoring supply and demand dynamics, as well as potential impacts from global events. The fluctuation in oil prices underscores the volatility inherent in commodity markets, with traders remaining vigilant to shifts in market sentiment.

data.title: STOCKS | South Korean Exchange Activates KOSDAQ Trading Halt Due to Futures Surge
data.description: South Korea's exchange has implemented a temporary halt on KOSDAQ programmatic trading following a significant rise in KOSDAQ 150 futures. According to Jin10, the futures experienced a 6% increase, prompting a five-minute suspension of programmatic trading activities. This mechanism is designed to stabilize the market and prevent excessive volatility during rapid price movements. The exchange's decision reflects its commitment to maintaining orderly trading conditions and protecting investors from potential market disruptions.

data.title: Aptos Introduces New Tokenomics Framework to Enhance Token Deflation
data.description: Aptos (APT) has announced a revised tokenomics framework focused on reducing token issuance and enhancing the burning process. According to NS3.AI, the updated framework includes capping the total supply at 2.1 billion APT, nearly halving staking rewards, increasing gas fees by tenfold, and permanently locking a significant number of tokens. Additionally, the launch of the Decibel DEX and changes to the grant and buyback systems are intended to further bolster token deflation.

data.title: Australian Public Spending Raises Concerns Over Economic Vulnerability
data.description: Australian governments are reportedly spending at an unsustainable rate, according to a recent report by the e61 Institute and McKinnon. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this trend is expected to lead to an increase in public debt, potentially making the economy more susceptible to future shocks. The report underscores the need for fiscal prudence to mitigate risks associated with rising debt levels. As public spending continues to grow, the economic stability of Australia may face challenges, prompting calls for strategic financial management to safeguard against potential vulnerabilities.

data.title: Arthur Hayes Reveals the Altcoin He Thinks Could Surge to $150 Next
data.description:
In a Substack essay titled “AI Carnage,” published on February 18, 2026, BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes laid out a bold macro thesis and attached it to a specific altcoin: Hyperliquid (HYPE). Hayes argues that the next major liquidity cycle will not begin with crypto enthusiasm, but with economic stress driven by artificial intelligence.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/arthur-hayes-reveals-the-altcoin-he-thinks-could-surge-to-150-next/

data.title: EU Nations Express Discontent Over Participation in 'Peace Committee' Meeting
data.description: Several EU countries, including France, Belgium, Spain, Ireland, Slovenia, and Portugal, have voiced strong dissatisfaction with the European Commission's decision to send a representative to the 'Peace Committee' meeting. According to Jin10, the European Commission decided on February 16 to dispatch Dubravka Šuica, the Commissioner for Mediterranean Affairs, to attend the inaugural official meeting of the 'Peace Committee' scheduled for February 19 in Washington. The decision was made without prior notification to member states, lacking necessary authorization, and could be interpreted as collective EU endorsement of the meeting.

data.title: Centrifuge Partners with Pharos to Enhance On-Chain Asset Management
data.description: Centrifuge has announced a strategic partnership with Layer 1 blockchain Pharos to create a shared infrastructure for managing institutional real-world assets on-chain. According to NS3.AI, this collaboration aims to streamline the tokenization and operation of assets such as U.S. Treasurys and AAA-rated structured credit products at scale. Centrifuge's CEO highlighted the significance of developing not only tokenization but also the distribution and infrastructure layers to enable practical on-chain institutional finance.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Announces 2026 Protocol Priorities Update
data.description:
Foresight News posted on X (formerly Twitter) that the Ethereum Foundation has released an update on its protocol priorities for 2026, outlining plans for significant advancements across three key areas. The foundation aims to enhance scalability by integrating Layer 1 execution with Blob expansion, improve user experience through native account abstraction and cross-chain interoperability, and strengthen Layer 1 security, censorship resistance, and network resilience.

The update highlights ongoing efforts to increase the Gas Limit to 100 million and beyond, advance ePBS, and further adjust Blob parameters. Additionally, the foundation is working on the zkEVM attester client and addressing security measures related to censorship resistance and post-quantum cryptography.

The next major upgrade, Glamsterdam, is scheduled for the first half of 2026, with the Hegotá upgrade planned to follow later in the year.

data.title: Crypto trading shifts as Russia mulls 2026 exchange blocks
data.description:
Russia crypto exchange ban 2026: Licensing, AML and data rules advance to onshore trading via MOEX; analysts cite DNS blocks, VPN risks and uncertain timing.
source: https://coincu.com/news/crypto-trading-shifts-as-russia-mulls-2026-exchange-blocks/

data.title: OpenAI pits AI agents against each other to red team smart contracts
data.description:
OpenAI said it is becoming increasingly important to evaluate the performance of AI agents in “economically meaningful environments” as their adoption grows.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/openai-benchmark-ai-agents-detect-smart-contract-flaws?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Whale Transactions Surge in Key Crypto Projects
data.description: Santiment posted on X that recent on-chain data indicates significant increases in whale transactions exceeding $100,000 across several cryptocurrency projects. These developments highlight growing interest and activity among large investors in the crypto market. The data suggests that these projects are experiencing heightened attention, potentially impacting their market dynamics and future valuations. Analysts are closely monitoring these trends to assess their implications for the broader cryptocurrency landscape.

data.title: Kresus Labs Secures $13 Million to Enhance Digital Wallet Infrastructure
data.description: Kresus Labs has announced the successful completion of a $13 million funding round. According to PANews, the investment was led by Hanwha Investment & Securities. The newly acquired funds will be directed towards expanding the company's enterprise digital wallet infrastructure, developing a platform for tokenizing real-world assets, and enhancing on-chain financial workflows. Additionally, Kresus Labs plans to build tools for both consumers and institutions, focusing on digital asset management, wallet recovery technology, and security systems based on multi-party computation.
